entries.speaker: lira
lines: Stop. Don't move.

entries.speaker: lira
lines: Patrol passes in forty seconds. You came from the
mine?

entries.speaker: edren
lines: Who are you?

entries.speaker: lira
lines: Someone who's been tracking what the Compact pulled
out of that ruin for three months. My name is Lira. I'm a
Forgewright — or I was, until I read the wrong documents.

entries.speaker: cael
lines: You defected.

entries.speaker: lira
lines: I found references to something called "Project
Pendulum" in a classified engineering report. The Compact doesn't
classify engineering reports. That was enough.

entries.speaker: lira
lines: Now. This way.

entries.speaker: edren
lines: We're cut off.

entries.speaker: sable
lines: Sorry, gentlemen. Inventory check. Very official.
Come back tomorrow.

entries.speaker: sable
lines: Friends of yours, or am I interrupting something
private?

entries.speaker: edren
lines: We're leaving. Now.

entries.speaker: sable
lines: Perfect. I was just leaving too. I was definitely
not in the middle of relieving the quartermaster's office of
anything valuable.

entries.speaker: sable
lines: I'm Sable. And unless one of you has a boat, we're
all going through the Wilds.

entries.speaker: lira
lines: She's right. The forest is the only way.

entries.speaker: edren
lines: Then we move. Stay together.
